articles.title: Sabatini warns Milan: "While nothing happens in the club, the players send farewell messages"
articles.summary: On his YouTube channel, Sandro Sabatini commented on the current situation at Milan which, to date, has not yet identified the new managers and the new coach. These are his words.

articles.title: Bucciantini: "Milan fans are listening to a bit too much. Leao, don't say things that hurt people!"
articles.summary: Surprise, then great disappointment and bitterness. The story between Milan and Leao risks ending with those sudden statements by Rafa, pronounced with great light-heartedness at an advertising event for one of his brands.

articles.title: M. Colombo: "Allegri tells Ibrahimovic to sell 5 players (including Leao and Loftus) and he calls them, this has not favored rowing on the same side"
articles.summary: Who knows how much time has passed, but just over a week ago Milan lost the match at San Siro against Cagliari and consequently their access to the next Champions League.

articles.title: Pellegatti sure: "Players are fleeing? If there is, it remains to be understood, they want to go to a club where there are clear ideas"
articles.summary: Carlo Pellegatti, on his YouTube channel, talked about the possible stampede that could happen this summer and said that his favorite would be Glasner with Rangnick.

articles.title: Crazy week: Milan reduced like this... Power vacuum to be filled immediately. Leao away and he won't be the only one
articles.summary: The last week has been among the craziest I have ever experienced following Milan. First the exclusion from the Champions League on the last day, then the immediate dismissal of the entire management and coach.

articles.title: Glasner, a possible name for the Rossoneri bench: this is how his last few seasons went
articles.summary: Oliver Glasner, former Crystal Palace manager, is a serious candidate for next year's AC Milan bench. Tomorrow there should be a meeting between him or his agent and the Rossoneri club to discuss the future.

articles.title: Order: "A prudent owner should have chosen a new line of command first and then sent the dismissal letter"
articles.summary: A week after the dismissal involving Allegri, Furlani, Moncada and Tare, Cardinale's Milan is still without replacements. It's the first of June and the Rossoneri are already extremely late for next season.

articles.title: CM: ‘Final decisions will be further delayed’ – Milan left waiting for structure
articles.summary:
AC Milan are in a position which they cannot afford to be in, but they are not rushing to escape it. Instead, they are going deeper into it.  Right now, Milan lack any structure. They have no manager, CEO, technical director, or chief scout. It is a position which they need to fix soon, but […]
